description: Normative JSON Schema for DEAL Simulation Protocol v0 metadata.json. Every simulation metadata artifact MUST validate against this schema. See spec/sims/v0/README.md for the human-readable reference.

deal_sim_protocol.description: Protocol version tag. Always 'v0' for artifacts conforming to this schema.

deal_sim_version.description: Version of the deal-sim SDK or Zig deal_sim.zig module that produced this artifact.

duration_s.description: Wall-clock duration of the simulation run in seconds.

sim_name.description: Name of the simulation as declared in deal.sims.toml.

staleness_key.description: SHA-256 content hash of {resolved_inputs, sim_source_bytes, registry_entry_toml} (D-83). Used by deal check --verify to detect stale evidence.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the simulation run completed.

tool.description: Tool adapter used to run this simulation: 'python', 'matlab', 'zig', or 'generic'.

tool_version.description: Version string of the tool runtime (e.g. Python version, MATLAB release).

v.description: Document format version. Always 1 for DEAL Simulation Protocol v0.

title: DEAL Simulation Protocol v0 — metadata.json
